componentDescription: Renders various types of charts with customizable data, legends, and status indicators.

type.description: Specifies the type of chart to be rendered (e.g., bar, line, pie).

data.description: Optional primary data structure for the chart, typically used for simpler charts.

dataPoints.description: Optional array of individual data points for the chart, offering more granular data representation.

title.description: Optional title to display above the chart.

showLegend.description: Determines whether the chart legend should be visible.

legendPosition.description: Specifies the position of the chart legend when `showLegend` is true.

showGrid.description: Determines whether grid lines should be displayed on the chart.

showTooltips.description: Determines whether interactive tooltips should appear on hover.

animated.description: Enables or disables animation for the chart's rendering or updates.

animationDuration.description: Sets the duration of chart animations in milliseconds.

responsive.description: Determines if the chart should resize automatically to fit its container.

aspectRatio.description: Defines the aspect ratio (width / height) of the chart when `responsive` is true.

width.description: Specifies the fixed width of the chart. Can be a number (pixels) or a string (e.g., '100%').

height.description: Specifies the fixed height of the chart. Can be a number (pixels) or a string (e.g., '100%').

views.description: Optional styles object to customize the appearance of different chart elements.

onDataPointClick.description: Callback function triggered when a data point on the chart is clicked.

onSeriesClick.description: Callback function triggered when a data series (e.g., a line in a line chart) is clicked.

isLoading.description: Indicates if the chart is currently loading data.

error.description: Optional error message or component to display when an error occurs.

noData.description: Determines if a 'no data' message should be shown, or provides a custom component for it.

loadingIndicator.description: Optional custom component to display as a loading indicator.

errorIndicator.description: Optional custom component to display when an error occurs.

noDataIndicator.description: Optional custom component to display when there is no data.

aria-label.description: Provides an accessible label for the chart component, used by screen readers.
